Info.ToolboxConfigModel:
{"entries":[{"content":{"appGalleryLabel":{"content":{"categoryID":"Deployment_Category_a0ece80b-1088-4bec-858c-c2850193924d","labelID":"Deployment_ToolboxAppGalleryFiles_a0ece80b-1088-4bec-858c-c2850193924d"},"type":"deployment.toolbox.model.ProjectLabel","uuid":"6606cc04-4a6c-46de-86ec-0bb858f0920d"},"authorEmail":"toma@mathworks.com","authorName":"Tom Anderson","authorOrganization":"MathWorks","description":"Bug-fix Version 1.4.2
- Clean up warning state on run error
- Add id to status stack to aid debug workflows

Bug-fix Version 1.4.1
- Bug fix for clean-up of state stacks
- Prototype of cancellable progress bar

Update Version 1.4.0

State is shown when view is created
- Renamed state to condition to avoid state\status confusion
- Removed push, pop and top methods to streamline app
- Improved popup behaviour:
 - Only one popup shown at a time
 - Close all popup options if multiple in stack

Update Version 1.3

State is shown when view is created
Added push, pop and top methods for those who are used to this terminology with stacks
Changed randomString to matlab.lang.internal.uuid
Tweaks to accessability of properties and methods
Add status now accepts a status as input
Added Getting Started.mlx
Warning: Syntax changed for add status. Arguments now as name value pairs.","gettingStartedGuideLabel":{"content":{"categoryID":"Deployment_Category_a0ece80b-1088-4bec-858c-c2850193924d","labelID":"Deployment_GettingStartedGuideFile_a0ece80b-1088-4bec-858c-c2850193924d"},"type":"deployment.toolbox.model.ProjectLabel","uuid":"d36b0c52-407d-455d-a9e5-bcdec112eaf2"},"minRelease":"R2019b","outputFileName":"AppStatusStack.mltbx","outputFolder":"/","summary":"Allows management of app status","supportedPlatforms":["Windows","Linux","Mac","MatlabOnline"],"toolboxFolder":"/","toolboxImgLabel":{"content":{"categoryID":"Deployment_Category_a0ece80b-1088-4bec-858c-c2850193924d","labelID":"Deployment_ToolboxImageFile_a0ece80b-1088-4bec-858c-c2850193924d"},"type":"deployment.toolbox.model.ProjectLabel","uuid":"0d1949c5-43ad-48b2-92b3-e093ffda8b7d"},"toolboxName":"AppStatusStack","toolboxVersion":"1.4.2","uniqueId":"29f22bcb-48a2-43f5-96fb-f950112f2d4a"},"type":"deployment.toolbox.model.ToolboxConfiguration","uuid":"9e556932-e146-454a-ae56-67c5553714ea"},{"content":{},"type":"deployment.toolbox.model.ProjectStateValidationIssueList","uuid":"dbc42c5e-b295-4c57-8c5d-8d6fdde2553b"}],"packageUris":["http://schema.mathworks.com/mf0/deployment_toolbox_model/1.0.0"],"version":"1.0"}
